hooks.command: project_dir="$PWD"; while [ "$project_dir" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$project_dir/.codex/hooks.json" ]; do project_dir="$(dirname "$project_dir")"; done; if [ ! -f "$project_dir/scripts/infinity_codex.py" ]; then echo "Infinity Codex hook: cannot locate scripts/infinity_codex.py from $PWD" >&2; exit 1; fi; exec /usr/bin/python3 "$project_dir/scripts/infinity_codex.py" hook
